## Third-Party Notices

## Original Project Materials

Original project materials include the skill/package framing and other text

- README.md
- SKILL.md
- references/INDEX.md
- Other original text files that do not indicate a different source or author

These materials are licensed under CC BY 4.0. See LICENSE.

## Third-Party Materials

Many files under references/ are based on external sources, including videos,
articles, academic papers, websites, books, public datasets, open-source
repositories, and tool documentation.

These materials may include:

- Transcripts or transcript-derived notes
- Summaries of third-party talks, articles, papers, or docs
- Extracted or scraped reference material
- Direct links to original tools, repos, PDFs, and websites

Those materials remain subject to the original authors' rights and licenses.
Inclusion in this repository does not relicense them.

Where possible, each reference file includes source attribution. If you intend
to reuse any third-party-derived material from this repository, review the
original source and its license first.

If you are a rights holder and believe a notice should be corrected or a source
should be handled differently, please update the attribution or remove the
material as appropriate.
